requirements.text: The system shall provide a location-specific restaurant discovery experience for signed-in users.
requirements.annotation_notes: The opening screens show a Columbus-specific discovery page with restaurant listings and recommendation sections, which directly supports a location-aware browsing capability.

requirements.text: The system shall expose account actions through a user menu.
requirements.annotation_notes: The sequence moves from the main page to an opened account dropdown that lists profile and other account destinations, directly showing this capability.

requirements.text: The system shall allow authenticated users to navigate to a dedicated profile settings area.
requirements.annotation_notes: The ordered flow clearly transitions from the account menu to the profile page, showing direct support for profile-settings navigation.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: removed condition on the start point of navigation

requirements.text: The system shall present existing profile information in editable, prepopulated form.
requirements.annotation_notes: The profile form already contains values such as name, phone, and email before further edits are made, indicating editable prefilled account data.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to add or edit a short personal bio in their profile.
requirements.annotation_notes: The short-bio field is visible and then populated with user-entered text, directly showing support for short free-text profile notes.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to record allergies and dietary restrictions as profile preferences.
requirements.annotation_notes: The profile page includes a dedicated allergies and restrictions section with selectable options, which directly grounds this profile-preference capability.

requirements.text: The system shall support selecting multiple allergy or restriction tags within the same profile.
requirements.annotation_notes: The flow first shows Dairy selected and then shows Dairy together with Peanuts, demonstrating multi-selection rather than a single exclusive choice.

requirements.text: The system shall provide visible information on which dietary preference is activated.
requirements.annotation_notes: Selected tags change visual state, making active choices distinguishable from inactive ones, which is a visible usability and clarity property of the form.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: had to change to be independent of specific UI implementation artifacts

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to add an explanatory note alongside allergies and dietary restrictions.
requirements.annotation_notes: A dedicated text area for allergy and restriction notes is visible throughout the profile workflow, indicating support for supplementary dietary context.

requirements.text: The system shall communicate how profile information is used in the reservation context.
requirements.annotation_notes: The profile page includes explanatory text stating that information is shared with restaurants a user reserves, which directly shows visible usage guidance.

requirements.text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.
requirements.annotation_notes: The page framing and explanatory text imply that the stored profile is meant to be reused when dining or reserving, but the later reservation-time application is not shown end to end.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: the notification of the restaurant may also have to have an UI or at least a email template
